title: v0.13 BEDROCK CPU-only validation slice (RUNS-confidence foundation)
positioning: wrf_gpu is a FAST GPU-native WRF-COMPATIBLE reimplementation, NOT a bit-true Fortran port. This slice proves the model RUNS STABLY, CONSERVES mass/water/energy, and RESTARTS bit-identically. It establishes RUNS-stability, not Fortran EQUIVALENCE.
base_commit_subject: [v013] PRE-COMPACT ANCHOR: running tasks + closeables + validation plan + carry-overs + release steps + positioning

tests.name: idealized_warm_bubble_skamarock_fp64
tests.pass_criterion: verdict==PASS: all 6 declared physics checks (finite, 0.5<=theta'_max<=2.5K, 1<=max|w|<=30 m/s, thermal-centroid rise>=500m, horizontal drift<=250m, relative dry-column mass drift<=1e-8)
tests.what_it_proves: RUNS-stability: the operational RK3+acoustic dry dycore integrates a rising thermal to completion at fp64 with coherent buoyant rise, bounded perturbation, symmetry (drift ~1e-11 m), and EXACT (0.0) dry-column mass conservation. Not a Fortran-equivalence claim.

tests.name: idealized_density_current_straka_fp64
tests.pass_criterion: verdict==PASS: all 6 declared physics checks (finite, -25<=theta'_min<=-5K, 1<=max|w|<=50 m/s, |front-15000m|<=2000m, 2<=rotor proxy<=4, relative dry-column mass drift<=1e-8)
tests.what_it_proves: RUNS-stability: the cold-pool density current propagates coherently with the canonical ~3-rotor Kelvin-Helmholtz structure, front at 14.15 km (within 850m of the 15 km canonical target), and dry-column mass conserved to 2.25e-9 relative over 9000 steps. Not a Fortran-equivalence claim.

tests.name: conservation_budget_controlled_cpu
tests.pass_criterion: Controlled closed-domain AND open-domain LBC/precip/evap-corrected budget closure: |dry-mass relative residual|<=1e-12, |water relative residual|<=1e-12, |dry/water absolute residual|<=1e-6 kg, |moist-static-energy residual|<=1e-6 J; budget terms reproduce WRF mass/area unit definitions to rtol 1e-13
tests.what_it_proves: RUNS-stability: the diagnostic conservation budget (dry-air mass, total water with precip/evap sinks, dry/moist static energy) closes to machine epsilon on a controlled non-unit-map-factor grid, for both closed and open(LBC-corrected) domains. Validates the conservation accounting that gates operational runs. Not a Fortran-equivalence claim.

tests.name: restart_bit_identity_full_carry
tests.pass_criterion: wrfrst-equivalent write->read round-trip is BIT-IDENTICAL for every State field, every promoted carry-scratch field, the full NoahMP land state, and the 3 NoahMP rad fields; held rthraten survives non-zero; schema drift and bad format FAIL CLOSED (raise ValueError)
tests.what_it_proves: RUNS-stability: a full forecast carry (State + scratch + NoahMP land + rad) serialized to wrfrst and re-read is bit-identical, so a restart continues the integration with zero drift; corruption fails closed. Mid-radiation-interval continuity (held rthraten) preserved.

tests.name: restart_checkpoint_and_wrfrst_netcdf_roundtrip
tests.pass_criterion: checkpoint write->read preserves all State fields bitwise + optional runtime state; wrfrst NetCDF state/carry/nested round-trips bit-identical under the WRF schema; KI3 snow/snso/seed dims written; missing schema fields FAIL CLOSED
tests.what_it_proves: RUNS-stability: a second independent restart path (pickle checkpoint) and the NetCDF wrfrst writer both round-trip bit-identically under the WRF restart schema. Corroborates restart bit-identity across both serialization backends.

tests.name: qke_finiteness_nan_suppression
tests.pass_criterion: _wrf_qke_minmax clamps to finite WRF bounds and suppresses NaN/Inf; in-range finite values are unchanged
tests.what_it_proves: RUNS-stability: the MYNN qke finiteness guard (the v0.11 d03-1km cold-start fix) keeps the PBL state finite, preventing NaN propagation in the coupled defaults.

skipped.name: tier2_live_dycore_mass_invariant_small_grid
skipped.reason: GPU-required: builds state via State.zeros, which hard-refuses CPU allocation by design (conftest auto-skips). The live-dycore-integration mass-invariant (n_steps with mass_residual_relative<=1e-10) requires the GPU backend. Conservation evidence on CPU instead comes from the idealized-case relative_mass_drift checks (0.0 / 2.25e-9) and the controlled conservation_budget test (residuals ~0). NOT a failure.

honest_gaps: All evidence here is RUNS-stability (the model integrates, conserves, restarts), NOT physics EQUIVALENCE to Fortran WRF. Equivalence (TOST n=15, forecast-vs-obs skill) is a separate GPU campaign.

The live-coupled-dycore mass invariant over a multi-step integration could not be exercised on CPU (State.zeros is GPU-only by design); covered indirectly by idealized relative_mass_drift + the budget closure, but a direct GPU re-run is still wanted.
Idealized cases are dry-dynamics; full moist physics + radiation + PBL coupling finiteness over a long real-case integration is a GPU/operational concern not covered by this cheap slice.
